prestazioni: Engine swap to a Rover 2.5L IOE (Inlet-Over-Exhaust) 4-cylinder (engine code: 10J) with a bespoke billet aluminum crankshaft from JE Pistons, forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for high-RPM stability. Pair with a custom 3-into-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Hayward & Scott, terminating in a 2.5-inch stainless steel exhaust with a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler for aggressive tone without drone.

Install a custom-fabricated Weber 45 DCOE sidedraft carburetor setup with velocity stacks and a custom intake manifold by RPI Engineering, paired with a Mallory Unilite distributor and MSD 6AL ignition system for precise spark control. Add a custom aluminum radiator by Griffin Thermal Products with dual 12-inch SPAL fans for optimal cooling under load.

Upgrade the stock 3-speed gearbox to a Rover LT95 4-speed manual transmission with a Quaife ATB differential (4.7:1 final drive ratio) and a custom hydraulic clutch system by Tilton Engineering. Suspension overhaul includes custom-fabricated 2-inch lift springs by Old Man Emu, Bilstein 5100 series shocks, and polybushings by SuperPro for improved articulation and durability.
estetica: Full custom aluminum body panels by JGS 4x4, including a one-piece hood with functional louvered vents, custom fender flares with integrated LED turn signals, and a rear tub with a removable aluminum tailgate for weight savings. Finish in a custom matte military green with hand-painted white star accents (WWII SAS replica livery).

Replace the stock steel wheels with custom 16x8-inch steel beadlock wheels by Hutchinson Industries, wrapped in BFGoodrich Mud-Terrain T/A KM3 tires (265/75R16). Add a custom front bumper by ARB with a Warn Zeon 10-S winch and a rear swing-out tire carrier with a jerry can holder and RotopaX fuel/water can mounts.

Interior overhaul with custom Recaro SRD bucket seats upholstered in olive green marine-grade vinyl, a custom aluminum dashboard with VDO gauges (oil pressure, water temp, voltmeter, and fuel level), and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices with integrated harness bar for Schroth 4-point harnesses. Add a custom center console with a Kenwood DNX995S navigation unit and a custom aluminum shift knob by Hurst.
